ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "obs_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the observation was made */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for the observation */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the celestial object being observed */,
  "obs_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the observation */,
  "obs_duration" REAL /* Duration of the observation */,
  "obs_status" TEXT /* Status of the observation (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., telescope, spectrograph) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the instrument is located */,
  "instrument_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the object */,
  "ra" REAL /* Right ascension of the object */,
  "dec" REAL /* Declination of the object */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band */,
  "band_wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the band */,
  "band_bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the band */,
  "band_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "light_curves" (
  "lc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each light curve */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the band */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the observation */,
  "flux" REAL /* Flux of the observation */,
  "fluxerr" REAL /* Error in the flux */,
  "zp" REAL /* Zero point of the observation */,
  "zpsys" TEXT /* Zero point system */,
  "lc_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the light curve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_light_curves_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_light_curves_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectra" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrum */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the band */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the spectrum */,
  "flux" REAL /* Flux of the spectrum */,
  "fluxerr" REAL /* Error in the flux */,
  "spec_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the spectrum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the band */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of access */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_access_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_type_id") REFERENCES access_types ("access_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "facility_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_facilities" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "object_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_object_types" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id", "object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "image_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image type */,
  "image_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the image type */,
  "image_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_image_types" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image */,
  "image_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id", "image_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectral_types" (
  "spectral_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral type */,
  "spectral_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the spectral type */,
  "spectral_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the spectral type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectral_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectrum_spectral_types" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectrum */,
  "spectral_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectral type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id", "spectral_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was versioned */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "data_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "data_format_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_data_formats" (
  "lc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lc_id", "data_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_types" (
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access type */,
  "access_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the access type */,
  "access_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_access_types" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the access log */,
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the access type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id", "access_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "headers" (
  "header_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each header */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation */,
  "header_name" TEXT /* Name of the header */,
  "header_value" TEXT /* Value of the header */,
  "header_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the header */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("header_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_headers_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)
